common.name: Name
common.addingLocalCopyTooltip: Adding this item as a local copy will create a new, editable version of this item saved to your local @:{'common.appName'} data. Changes made to this item will not affect the author's original data, and you will not receive updates from the author.
common.importOverwriteWarning: This import data will overwrite an existing campaign with the same ID ({title}). The existing campaign was last updated on {date}.

language.experimentalNote: Non-English translation is community-contributed and a work in progress. Some text may be untranslated or imperfect.

contentManager.title: @:{'common.contentManager'}
contentManager.deletePackConfirm: This will remove this pack and all of its contents from @:{'common.appName'}. User data that relies on this content will remain available. Are you sure you want to continue?

v2Import.importAllTooltip: Attempt to import all pending items. Items that are still missing dependencies will remain in a pending state.
v2Import.forceImportAllTooltip: Force import all pending items, stripping any unresolvable dependencies. Use this if you want to get everything imported regardless of missing content, but be aware that the imported items will be stripped of missing data and may need to be manually fixed up after import.
v2Import.deleteConfirm: Delete this pending v2 backup? This action cannot be undone.
v2Import.strippedBody: The following items were removed because they could not be resolved
v2Import.forceImportNotice: This will import the {type} with all unresolvable items removed. The following dependencies cannot be found and will be stripped

nav.noNewItemsSaved: No new items will be saved until the limit is increased or data is deleted.
nav.storageWarningTooltip: @:{'common.appName'} has exceeded the storage warning threshold. More details are available in the Storage tab of the Options Menu.
nav.storageAlertTooltip: @:{'common.appName'} has exceeded the maximum storage threshold.
nav.storageDetails: More details are available in the Storage tab of the Options Menu.

about.title: @:{'common.appName'}
about.description: @:{'common.appName'} is a free, open-source digital toolkit and gameplay assistant for building and playing @:{'common.gameName'} TTRPG games.
about.coreBookInfo: The @:{'common.gameName'} CORE Book, @:{'common.appName'}, and associated content can be found at

help.howToAddContent: How do I add content from Lancer expansions to @:{'common.appName'}?
help.howToSeeExotics: How do I see Exotic Items in the Compendium?
help.cloudAccountFaq: Do I need to pay to make a @:{'common.appName'} cloud account?
help.whereAreNpcsBody: If you bought the Lancer Core Book, you'll find a downloadable data package that contains all Core NPC data on the Lancer Core Book's itch.io page, which you can access through the Content Manager. You can use the Content Manager's {installLcp} tab to import the package and start building and running encounters.
help.howToAddContentBody: Official @:{'common.gameName'} content can be found on {itchLink} Player-facing LCP content for @:{'common.appName'} can be found in the {downloadDemo} section for any Massif Press publication; GM-facing content (i.e. NPCs) can be purchased alongside the PDF content. Links to this content (and featured community content) can also be found in the Content Manager's {lcpDirectory}.
help.howToSeeExoticsBody: To prevent spoilers for players, @:{'common.appName'} defaults to hiding Exotic Items. To change their visibility, you can use @:{'common.appName'}'s {options} menu, and can enable the {showExoticsToggle} toggle.
help.cloudAccountFaqBody: @:{'common.appName'} Cloud Accounts are free for all users. For Patreon supporters, cloud accounts gain access to additional features, such as the expanded cloud storage and additional active table instances.
help.additionalHelpBody: The {faqLink} may have an answer to your question! If you still can't find what you're looking for, please stop by {discordLink} (and specifically the #comp-con channel) with your questions or comments for the developers.

credits.patronThanks: The continued development of @:{'common.appName'} would not be possible without the generous

achievements.name: @:{'common.name'}
achievements.hiddenCount: {count} achievement not shown | {count} achievements not shown
achievements.cannotBeUndoneFull: This {emphasis} be undone. It is strongly recommended to create a backup first.

settingsPage.showExoticsLabel: Show Exotic items in the Compendium
settingsPage.showDesktopTablesTooltip: By default, @:{'common.appName'} shows a simplified view of Compendium tables on mobile devices to improve readability and performance. Enabling this option will show the full desktop version of tables on all devices. This may make some tables difficult to read or cause performance issues on mobile devices.
settingsPage.showExoticsTooltip: Enabling this option may reveal campaign spoilers and it is recommended to leave this setting DISABLED if you are not the GM
settingsPage.errorReportingTooltip: Error reporting allows anonymous error data to be sent to the developer to help identify and resolve bugs and other issues.
settingsPage.errorReportingPiiNote: No personally identifiable information is collected at this level.
settingsPage.enhancedReportingTooltip: Enhanced error reporting sends the developer additional data, including {nonAnon}. All other PII is scrubbed before transmission. This is {notNecessary} unless you are actively working with the developer to resolve a specific issue and have been asked to enable this setting.
settingsPage.enhancedReportingPiiNote: non-anonymous information, specifically IP address and user ID
settingsPage.createBackupTooltip: @:{'common.appName'} relies on your browser's secure storage to save and load its data. Generally, this data is safe from deletion, but certain browser settings and utilities can sometimes clear this data, resulting in the loss of your @:{'common.appName'} data. It's good practice to back up your data from time to time.
settingsPage.downloadV2Tooltip: @:{'common.appName'} has saved a complete backup of your v2 @:{'common.appName'} data. This can be imported into the v2 app at old.compcon.app.
settingsPage.loadBackupTooltip: .compcon files are @:{'common.appName'} bulk export files that contain all of your local data in a single file. You can create a .compcon backup file using the 'Create Data Backup' button. Use this option to load .compcon backup files that you have created or obtained from another source. It is recommended to create a backup before loading a .compcon file, especially if the file came from another source.
settingsPage.mergeWarning: @:{'common.appName'} will attempt to merge import data with your existing data.
settingsPage.overwriteWarning: The overwrite strategy will replace all of your existing local data with the data from the imported file and cannot be undone. It is strongly recommended to create a backup before using this option.
settingsPage.v2BackupDescription: This is a v2 @:{'common.appName'} backup file. It will be processed using the v2 import system: content packs will be installed first, followed by pilots, NPCs, and encounters. Items that require LCPs not present in this backup will be saved to pending v2 imports in the Content Manager.
settingsPage.v2AppendNote: v2 backup imports are always processed using the "append" strategy.
settingsPage.resetV2Tooltip: Resets the v2 migration status, allowing the V2 Data button to appear again if it was dismissed.

storage.storageUsageFull: @:{'common.appName'} is currently using {used} of {total}, or {percent} of your available storage. This includes space reserved by @:{'common.appName'} for app management.
storage.neverAutoDeleteFull: @:{'common.appName'} will {never} automatically delete data marked for deletion.
storage.autoDeleteFull: @:{'common.appName'} will permanently delete data after it has been marked as deleted for at least {days} This will not affect items not already marked for deletion.
storage.warningDescription: @:{'common.appName'} will display a warning message when
storage.maxDescription: @:{'common.appName'} will prevent the creation of new data after
storage.neverAutoDelete: automatically delete data marked for deletion.
storage.noStorageAccess: @:{'common.appName'} is unable to access device storage. This may be due to a browser setting or extension. @:{'common.appName'} will fall back to using local storage, which is limited to 5MB. This may result in @:{'common.appName'} being unable to save data. Please check your browser settings, or allow @:{'common.appName'} to access "Persistent Storage" if prompted. If you are using a browser extension that blocks storage access, please disable it for @:{'common.appName'}. If neither of these options work, please consider downloading @:{'common.appName'} as a PWA.
storage.areYouSure: Are you sure you want to continue?

userDataViewer.description: This is the locally-saved user data. These items should generally not have to be reset, but may be useful in debugging or clearing a persistent loading issue.
userDataViewer.achievementNote: Resetting User Data will not reset achievement unlocks (this can be done in the Achievement Browser).

packInstall.alreadyInstalledWarning: The following content pack is already installed and will be replaced: | The following content packs are already installed and will be replaced
packInstall.v3Warning: The following content has not been registered as v3 compatible. These packs will still work, but will not be able to take advantage of v3 features, especially in active mode.
packInstall.dependencyError: The following content pack has uninstalled dependencies and cannot be installed yet. It will be skipped: | The following content packs have uninstalled dependencies and cannot be installed yet. They will be skipped
packInstall.alreadyInstalledNote: A pack with this same name and author is already installed.
packInstall.willReplace: It will be replaced by this copy.
packInstall.requiresContent: This LCP requires the following content to be installed before it can be added
packInstall.installingPacks: Installing {count} content pack… | Installing {count} content packs…
packInstall.willUpgradeTo: It will be upgraded to v.{version}

packsDirectory.communityAbout: @:{'common.appName'} is proud to collaborate with the @:{'common.gameName'} community in making these unofficial content packs available. They are offered as-is at the discretion of the author.
packsDirectory.communityContribute: If you are interested in creating your own homebrew @:{'common.gameName'} content, or submitting your content to be featured in this directory, please
packsDirectory.communityNotice: In-app downloading and automatic subscription to community LCP updates are not yet supported. Once the author support tools are available, community LCPs will be migrated to v3 and will be able to take advantage of the same update and subscription mechanisms as official Massif Press content packs. Follow the {blog} to stay up to date on progress.

packConfig.title: Content Configurations
packConfig.description: Content configurations allow you to create and manage sets of LCPs that can be applied to Pilots and NPCs that allow or limit selections to specific content. Pilots and NPCs without configurations set will have access to all installed and activated LCPs
packConfig.applyNote: These configurations can be applied to Pilots and NPCs in their options menus.
packConfig.noLcpsPrefix: No LCPs added. Only content from the
packConfig.removeFromConfig: Remove this pack from the configuration

packInfo.v2ContentDescription: This content pack has not been registered as v3 compatible. This pack will still work correctly, but will not be able to take advantage of v3 features.
packInfo.dependenciesTooltip: Dependencies are other content packs that this pack requires to function properly. They must be installed and activated for this pack to load correctly.

communityTable.v3Compatible: This content pack is compatible with the latest version of @:{'common.appName'} and supports v3 features.
communityTable.v3Incompatible: This content pack uses the v2 content format. It will function correctly but will lack features of v3-compatible packs. @:{'common.appName'} will not be able to manage effects or statuses from this pack in Active Mode.
communityTable.subscribedTooltip: Currently subscribed to latest updates. Click to unsubscribe.
communityTable.subscribeTooltip: Click to allow @:{'common.appName'} to update this LCP whenever a new version is published

v2Auto.autoMigrated: Your v2 data was automatically migrated to v3 on startup.
v2Auto.pilotsPending: {count} pilot pending (missing LCPs) | {count} pilots pending (missing LCPs)
v2Auto.npcsPending: {count} NPC pending (missing LCPs) | {count} NPCs pending (missing LCPs)
v2Auto.encountersPending: {count} encounter pending (missing NPCs) | {count} encounters pending (missing NPCs)
v2Auto.lcpsImported: {count} content pack imported | {count} content packs imported
v2Auto.pendingNote: Pending items can be re-imported from the Content Packs panel after installing the required LCPs.
v2Auto.errorsDuringMigration: {count} error during migration | {count} errors during migration
v2Auto.downloadBackupTooltip: This .compcon file can be used in a v2 environment at https://old.compcon.app. This can be downloaded at any time from the Options menu

migrationRepair.buttonTooltip: Scan for and repair common issues with v2-migrated data.
migrationRepair.foundFixable: Found {count} fixable issue | Found {count} fixable issues
migrationRepair.andRequiringManual: and {count} issue requiring manual action | and {count} issues requiring manual action

achievementItem.hiddenNote: This achievement is hidden and will be revealed once unlocked

packsList.missingDependencies: This pack is missing one or more dependencies and cannot be activated.

v2ImportNotify.reimportSuccessText: {count} item imported successfully. | {count} items imported successfully.
v2ImportNotify.reimportPendingText: {count} item still pending missing content. | {count} items still pending missing content.
v2ImportNotify.missingDependencies: Missing dependencies are not yet available.

import.missingPacks: Item is missing required content packs. This item will be saved to the v2 Imports collection in the Content Manager, and can be imported once the required content packs are installed and activated.
import.oldVersionWarning: Some data to be imported was created using an older version of @:{'common.appName'} and does not include nested content pack information. This data will be saved to the v2 Imports collection in the Content Manager, but cannot be imported until the required content packs are installed and activated. These items can be imported once the required content packs are installed and activated, or force-imported in the Content Manager.
import.v2BackupText: {count} encounter saved to v2 Imports for later import. | {count} encounters saved to v2 Imports for later import.

campaign.managedIn: Imported campaigns are managed in the {library}
campaign.deleteWarn1: This campaign will be {strong}. This action cannot be undone. If you're sure you want to delete
campaign.deleteWarn2: type the campaign title into the text entry field below and click {confirm}.
campaign.importHelp: This tool will import an editable, unpublished Campaign {jsonFile} from your device.{br}To import a published campaign file with the {lcd} extension into your collection, use the file import tool in the {campaignCollection} menu, or the Import Campaign tool in the {manageContent} dialog under the main menu .
campaign.exportEditableHelp: You can export this editable campaign as a JSON file for backup, device transfer, or collaborative editing.
campaign.toProduce: To produce a campaign package suitable for distribution, select {publish} instead.
campaign.notPublishedHelp: This campaign has not been published. Publish a first version of this campaign to export a campaign package via file or share code.
campaign.exportLcdHelp: Download a Lancer Campaign Distributable (.lcd) file that can be imported into another user's @:{'common.appName'}
campaign.saveLocalHelp: Save a read-only copy of this campaign into your local Campaign Library for use in active mode or online play
campaign.copyShareCodeHelp: Copy this share code for this campaign to your clipboard. Share codes can be used to import this campaign into another @:{'common.appName'} instance.
campaign.generateShareCodeHelp: Upload this campaign to the cloud repository to generate a share code for other users to import this campaign into their @:{'common.appName'} instance. Generating a share code will automatically update the cloud repository with the latest version of this campaign whenever a new version is published.
campaign.deletePageConfirm: Do you want to delete the {type} "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

encounter.combatantAddedText: An instance of {name} was added to {encounterName}.

stats.resetConfirm: This will reset all stats to T{tier} {name} default values. Are you sure?

editorFooter.upToDate: Item is up to date with remote changes
editorFooter.downloadRemote: Download all remote changes to this item, overwriting local data.
editorFooter.mustLogin: Must be logged in to update

labelDialog.addOverwrite: This will add {emphasis} the label value for all selected items.
labelDialog.deleteText: This will {emphasis} the label value for all selected items.

sectionEditor.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete the textItem titled "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

overview.imagesMustLink: Campaign images must be linked, and cannot originate from local @:{'common.appName'} data.

pageContent.themeColorsHelp: These colors will change based on the user's selected @:{'common.appName'} theme
pageContent.paletteColorsHelp: These colors {strong} change based on the user's selected @:{'common.appName'} theme
pageContent.deleteItemConfirm: Do you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

narrativeLink.linkedHelp: This item is currently linked to a Narrative Element in your GM Collection. As modifications are made to the linked element, this item will automatically receive updates. Click the button to unlink this item from the GM Collection and store it as an instanced element in campaign data.
narrativeLink.relinkHelp: To re-link this item, select it in the "Set Narrative Element" menu.
narrativeLink.notLinkedHelp: This item is not linked to a Narrative Element in your GM Collection and will not receive automatic updates, but will be saved as a instanced element in campaign data.
narrativeLink.linkHelp: To link this item to a Narrative Element, select it in the "Set Narrative Element" menu.

combatant.uniqueInstanceHelp: This is a unique instance of this NPC tied to this Encounter data. Editing this NPC will not affect the original NPC data.
combatant.linkedSource: The source of this NPC instance is present in your NPC roster ({name}) and can receive updates from the original
combatant.notLinkedSource: This NPC instance is not linked to a valid source in your NPC roster
combatant.notLinkedSourceDot: This NPC instance is not linked to a valid source in your NPC roster.
combatant.updateInstanceTooltip: Update this instance property to the source
combatant.updateAllTooltip: Update all instance properties to the source
combatant.atPcCountHelp: This NPC will be marked as being part of the encounter only if there are at least as many Player Characters as indicated. Leaving this blank will indicate that is will be part of the encounter at all PC counts.
combatant.onTurnHelp: This NPC will be marked as joining the encounter on the specified turn. Leaving this blank will indicate that this NPC can be used as a reinforcement at the GM's discretion.
combatant.addToRosterTooltip: Add a copy of this NPC to your roster and link this instance to the new roster entry.

sitrep.modifiedWarning: This sitrep has been modified. Loading a new preset will delete these changes. Are you sure you want to continue?
sitrep.deletePresetConfirm: Delete preset {name}? This cannot be undone.

environment.modifiedWarning: This environment has been modified. Loading a new preset will delete these changes. Are you sure you want to continue?

encImport.notEncounterFile: The selected file does not contain encounter data.
encImport.missingNpcs: This encounter references NPCs that have not been imported yet. It will be saved to the v2 Imports collection in the Content Manager and can be imported once the required NPCs are available.
encImport.someMissingNpcs: Some encounters reference NPCs that have not been imported yet. These encounters will be saved to the v2 Imports collection in the Content Manager and can be imported once the required NPCs are available.

npcFeature.ignoreLimitHint: Additional features beyond the recommended guidelines can be added by toggling the "Ignore Limit" option above
npcFeature.noneFound: No NPC Features could be found for this selection

npcAlert.selectUpTo: You may select up to {n} additional feature | You may select up to {n} additional features
npcAlert.selectN: Select {n} additional feature | Select {n} additional features

tier.detectedEdits: @:{'common.appName'} has detected edited stat values. How would you like to proceed?

layerSelector.help1: Eidolon data are included with the No Room for a Wallflower Campaign Book and are therefore not included with @:{'common.appName'} by default. You can find Eidolon data as additional downloadable content on the {link} Campaign Book page.
layerSelector.help2: If you have already downloaded the Eidolon data, you can import it into @:{'common.appName'} via the Content Manager available on the Main Menu or in the Options menu on the right side of the nav bar.

eidolonData.help1: Eidolon data are included with the paid version of No Room for a Wallflower: Act 1, and can be found in the downloadable content section on the {link}
eidolonData.linkText: No Room for a Wallflower: Act 1 itch.io page.
eidolonData.help2: If you have already downloaded the Wallflower GM LCP, you can import it into @:{'common.appName'} via the Content Manager available on the Main Menu or in the Options menu on the right side of the nav bar.

npcFeatures.selectClassToAdd: Select a Class to add Features

featurePrint.weaponAttacks: This weapon can make {count} attacks at a time.

fields.caption: Caption
fields.subtitle: Subtitle
fields.mustBeAnItchioUrl: Must be an itch.io URL to enable automatic management in @:{'common.appName'}

subtitles.addSetOrDeleteA: Add, set, or delete a GM Label
subtitles.addANewEmptyFreeform: Add a new empty free-form section under this page. A Section is a container for other content items, and can be used to organize your campaign in any way you see fit.
subtitles.addANewEmptyBeat: Add a new empty Beat under this section. A Beat is a section for an important event or moment in the story.
subtitles.addANewEmptyMission: Add a new empty Mission under this page. A Mission contains specific goals and objectives that can be completed within a discrete period of time, and typically contains Combats.
subtitles.addANewEmptyCombat: Add a new empty Combat under this page. A Combat contains Encounters, as well as GM guidelines, narrative detail regarding the battle, and potential outcomes.
subtitles.addANewEmptyDowntime: Add a new empty Downtime under this page. Downtime is the narrative space between missions, where moment-to-moment action doesn't matter as much and roleplaying matters much more.

actions.noncharacterObjectsSuchAsTerrain: Non-character objects (such as terrain items) that can be tracked in combat encounters.

tooltips.changeTierAndAdjustEdited: Change tier and adjust edited stats by the same amount as the default stat changes.
tooltips.changeTierAndKeepEdited: Change tier and keep edited stat values, even if they fall below the new tier's defaults.
tooltips.changeTierAndDiscardAll: Change tier and discard all edited stat values.

addCombatant.addedText: {name} has been added to the encounter.

mechActions.pilotEjectedText: {name}'s has ejected from the mech and is now IMPAIRED.

npcActions.npcStabilizedText: {name} has cleared all HEAT, is no longer EXPOSED, and has reloaded their weapons.

pcSheet.activeMechChangedText: Active mech changed to {mechName}. Character sheet state has been reset.

roster.activeMechTooltip: The active mech will be instantiated for use in this encounter. Once the encounter is started, the active mech cannot be changed without resetting the mech's stats
roster.pilotNoMech: Pilot will be instanced without a mech

encMgr.devNoteReport: This feature is still in development. After-action reports will be expanded in future builds.
encMgr.devNoteLogs: This feature is still in development. Additional data and export options will be available in future builds.
encMgr.deleteArchiveDetail: This will flag the archive for deletion. It will no longer appear in this list, but will be permanently deleted based on your retention options in the Options Menu.

encSummary.requiresPilot: An encounter requires at least one pilot.

newEnc.title: New Local Active Encounter
newEnc.additionalNpcs: Additional NPCs can be added in the Encounter Runner after creation.

leaveDialog.prompt: Do you want to save this encounter before exiting?

pcEndRound.forfeitActions: Ending the round will forfeit any unused actions.

pcOptions.warningReplace: Warning: The imported Character Sheet state will replace the current Character Sheet state.

gmOptions.warningReplace: Warning: The imported encounter state will replace the current encounter state.

tableIndex.title: Table index
tableIndex.coreOnly: Currently, only Lancer Core Book tables are supported. LCP and custom tables will have to be resolved manually
tableIndex.selectTable: Select a table to view its contents.

runnerItem.bracedDesc: You count as having RESISTANCE to all damage, heat, and burn from the attack that triggered this Brace, and until the end of your next turn, all other attacks against you are made at +1 Difficulty.

addStub.description: Placeholders are ad-hoc stat containers used to track entities within an encounter that aren't in your @:{'common.appName'} roster, or, can't be represented within @:{'common.appName'}. They can be used for PCs, NPCs, complex encounter elements, environmental hazards, and so forth. {emphasis}
addStub.noPersist: Placeholders do not persist outside of the encounter they are created in.

panelBase.reduceActivations: This will reduce reduced the remaining activations by 1 and reset all actions.

telemetry.devNote: This feature is still in development. Additional telemetry data is forthcoming. {emphasis}
telemetry.collectedNote: Telemetry data is collected at the end of every round

combatAction.alreadyUsed: This action has already been used this turn.

deploy.generateInstance: This will generate and deploy a new instance of {name} for {actor} as a {action}

equipCmd.markUsedHint: Click to mark as {used} . Weapons with the LOADING tag must be reloaded before they can be loaded again

mountBonus.warning: Mount bonus effects on weapon attacks are {not} automatically enforced by @:{'common.appName'}. Please ensure you manually apply any relevant effects during gameplay.

unitLoadout.clickToRoll: Click to roll. NPC Features will recharge on rolls equal to or higher than their roll value.

weaponAttack.destroyed: This weapon has been destroyed and must be repaired before it can be activated.
weaponAttack.alreadyActivated: This weapon has already been activated.
weaponAttack.mustReload: It must be reloaded before it can be used again.
weaponAttack.mustRecharge: It must be recharged before it can be used again.
weaponAttack.ordnanceMech: This mech has taken non-Protocol actions this turn. This ordnance weapon cannot be activated.
weaponAttack.ordnanceUnit: This unit has taken non-Protocol actions this turn. This ordnance weapon cannot be activated.
weaponAttack.ordnancePilot: This pilot has taken non-Protocol actions this turn. This ordnance weapon cannot be activated.
weaponAttack.outOfUses: This weapon is out of uses and cannot be activated this turn.
weaponAttack.canMake: This weapon can make {n} attacks per activation.

mechPanel.meltdown: This mech has suffered a reactor meltdown. It is permanently destroyed and cannot be repaired.

pilotPanel.killed: This pilot has been killed in action.
pilotPanel.unconscious: Pilot is unconscious, and any additional damage will kill them.

fields.coolYourMechClearingAll: Cool your mech, clearing all heat and EXPOSED.
fields.mark1RepairToRestore: Mark 1 REPAIR to restore all HP.
fields.clearAnyBurnCurrentlyAffecting: Clear any burn currently affecting your mech.
fields.clearAConditionThatWasnt: Clear a condition that wasn't caused by one of your own systems, talents, etc
fields.clearAnAdjacentAlliedCharacters: Clear an adjacent allied character's condition that wasn't caused by one of their own systems, talents, etc.

tooltips.addAPilotFromYourLocalPilotRoster: Add a pilot from your local Pilot Roster
tooltips.importAPilotFromJsonData: Import a pilot from JSON data
tooltips.markYourMechAsInCascade: Mark your mech as IN CASCADE
tooltips.listTagsPresentOnCharactersOrEquipmentIn: List tags present on characters or equipment in this encounter
tooltips.thisWillAddACopy: This will add a copy of this pilot to your encounter. If the author updates their original data, you will not receive those changes.
tooltips.addsAPilottypeCombatantPlaceholder: Adds a pilot-type combatant placeholder without any pilot data.
tooltips.reviewTheCombatLogAnd: Review the combat log and battlefield telemetry from this sheet and optionally save it to your pilot's history.
tooltips.replaceTheThematicStatTrackers: Replace the thematic stat trackers for HP, Heat, etc. with straightforward number inputs.
tooltips.thisControlsIfColumnsWill: This controls if columns will be used when rendering a combatant's information in the encounter panel. This will only work on wide resolution screens.
tooltips.simpleTickbarsAreShownOn: Simple tickbars are shown on mobile (tablet and lower) resolutions. Enabling this will force the standard tickbars to display regardless of screen size. This may cause layout issues on smaller screens.
tooltips.thisControlsHowManyColumns: This controls how many columns will be used when rendering a combatant's loadouts or feature sets in the encounter panel. Higher values may cause layout issues on smaller screens.
tooltips.exportsAPlainTextVersion: Exports a plain text version of the combat log.
tooltips.exportsAStructuredJsonVersion: Exports a structured JSON version of the combat log for use in other applications.
tooltips.exportsAPlainTextVersion2: Exports a plain text version of the combatant's current stats.
tooltips.rollAllDiceTakingThe: Roll all dice, taking the best result

codeEntry.title: Enter Unlock Code
codeEntry.tooltip: Enter an unlock code to gain access to additional account features or LCP content.
codeEntry.success: Code accepted! Your content should now be available.
codeEntry.npcSubTooltipOff: Enable download and automatic update access to Core Book NPC data by either linking your itch.io account with a purchase of the Lancer Core Book, or by entering the URL from the QR code in the front of your copy of the Lancer Core Book.
codeEntry.npcsAddedViaItch: Your account has access to Lancer Core Book NPC data. This content was added to your account via a linked itch.io purchase.
codeEntry.npcsAddedViaCode: Your account has access to Lancer Core Book NPC data. This content was added to your account via QR code link.

account.lcpUpdatedText: The latest version of {title} has been downloaded and installed.
account.lcpUpdateErrorText: An error occurred while attempting to download {title}.
account.allLcpsUpdateErrorText: An error occurred while attempting to update your LCPs.
account.syncPartialText: Failed to fully sync {failures} items. This may be due to missing local data.
account.deletionCompleteTitle: {count} Item Permanently Deleted | {count} Items Permanently Deleted
account.flaggedRemovedText: All flagged items have been removed from the cloud.
account.noFlaggedText: No items were flagged for deletion.
account.deletionFailedBulkText: An error occurred while deleting flagged items.
account.collectionErrorText: There was an error updating the collection. Please try again later.
account.collectionUpdatedText: Collection items have been updated successfully.

auth.accountCreated: User Account created successfully. Redirecting to Sign-In.
auth.codeSentToLabel: A verification code was sent to
auth.alreadyHaveCode: I already have a verification code
auth.inputCodeToFinish: Input the verification code to finish creating your account
auth.signupEmailInfo: The e-mail address you input will be used to send you a confirmation code to finalize the creation of your account. From there, your e-mail will only be used to log in to your @:{'common.appName'} account.
auth.signupPrivacyInfo: We are committed to keeping your e-mail address confidential. We do not sell, rent, or lease contact data or lists to third parties, and we will never provide your personal information to any third party individual, government agency, or company at any time, for any reason.

ui.imageDeleteWarning: Please note that this will break any references to this image in your data. This action cannot be undone.

itemLink.lcpHint: If this item is part of a Lancer Content Pack, please ensure that the pack is installed and enabled.

patreon.linkInfo: If you are subscribed to the @:{'common.appName'} Patreon, linking your Patreon account will increase your maximum cloud storage space and unlock realtime table creation in GM mode.

syncSettings.cloudFullSync: Cloud storage is full! Unable to sync new data.
syncSettings.syncOverridesNote: The following operations override sync settings and should be used with caution.

collection.distributeWarning: Distributing content that you are not authorized to is against against the @:{'common.appName'} terms of service and will result in a ban from the cloud service, deletion of your cloud account and data, and removal and blocking from @:{'common.appName'} Patreon membership.
collection.ensureRights: Please ensure you have the rights to distribute any content you add to the cloud service. If in doubt, contact the author of the content.

cloudData.dataTabDesc: PC and GM data stored in your @:{'common.appName'} account.
cloudData.imagesTabDesc: All image data you have uploaded to your @:{'common.appName'} account.

management.verifyEmailSent: A verification e-mail has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox and enter the verification code below to finalize your changes.

deleteAccount.intro: This tool will delete your account and all associated data. This includes
deleteAccount.incCloudData: Cloud data, including saved pilots, mechs, and NPCs and other GM data
deleteAccount.incImages: Images uploaded to your personal cloud archive
deleteAccount.incArchives: Account and LCP archives stored on the cloud
deleteAccount.incActiveMode: All remotely stored active mode data and history
deleteAccount.addNoSync: Your save data will no longer sync between devices and browsers
deleteAccount.addShareExpire: Any shared items will no longer update, and all share codes will expire
deleteAccount.addSyncTerminated: Any active syncs will be terminated
deleteAccount.addRemovedTables: You will be removed from any active tables
deleteAccount.addGmTables: If you are a GM, all tables you own will be archived and slated for deletion
deleteAccount.addSubFeed: If you publish a subscription feed, subscribers will no longer be able to receive updates
deleteAccount.notLocalData: Delete any local data on your device
deleteAccount.notPurchases: Revoke any purchases through itch.io or end your Patreon subscription
deleteAccount.irreversible: This action is irreversible. This data will be permanently and irrevocably deleted.
deleteAccount.ensureBackup: Please ensure you have a local backup of any data you wish to keep.
deleteAccount.enterTextToConfirm: Enter the text {phrase} to confirm account deletion.
deleteAccount.deletionInProgress: Deletion in progress. This may take a few moments. @:{'common.appName'} will restart once this process is complete.

itch.linkInfo1: Linking your itch.io account will allow you to download Massif content from the itch.io store with one click.
itch.linkInfo2: You can also subscribe to Massif LCPs to auto-update your local copy when the author releases a new version.
itch.purchasesLinked: @:{'common.appName'} has linked the following itch.io purchases to your account
itch.eligibleUpdates: Your @:{'common.appName'} cloud account is eligible for the following automatic updates
itch.manageContentHint: Unlinked LCPs and other content can still be manually added via the {link} page.
itch.noAutoTrack: @:{'common.appName'} does not automatically track new itch.io data.
itch.updateHint: If you have new purchases or download keys on your itch.io account click the {update} button below to add these to @:{'common.appName'}. Unfortunately, it is not possible to link non-Massif purchases at this time due to limitations in the itch.io API.
itch.lastPolled: @:{'common.appName'} last polled your itch account on {date}

subscriptions.unsubscribeInfo: Unsubscribing from this collection will remove it from your collection list. You will no longer receive updates from this author. The local data from this collection will not be removed.
subscriptions.newVersionAvailable: There is a new version of this collection available.
subscriptions.deletedCollectionInfo: The collection "{name}" has been deleted by the author. Although your local data has not been removed, you will no longer receive updates from this collection.

storage.iosWarning: iOS browsers limit storage for websites and may {emphasis} after 7 days of inactivity. To prevent data loss, install @:{'common.appName'} to your home screen
storage.iosStep1: Tap the {share} button {icon} in Safari's toolbar
storage.onceInstalled: Once installed, open @:{'common.appName'} from your home screen icon.
storage.noStorageWarning: The current browser does not appear to support persistent storage. It is {recommended} to run @:{'common.appName'} on a browser that is capable of storing persistent app data, or, saving and running @:{'common.appName'} {pwaLink}
storage.v3StorageWarning: As of the v3 update, @:{'common.appName'} requires more local device storage than is available by default. Functionality will be impaired unless @:{'common.appName'} is granted the {permission} for this browser.
storage.denialNotice: @:{'common.appName'} has detected that persistent storage has been denied for this app. Persistent storage must be enabled for @:{'common.appName'} to operate correctly

migration.title: v3 Account Migration
migration.previousError: A previous migration attempt encountered an error. You can retry below.
migration.detectedText: @:{'common.appName'} has detected that you have an existing account that has not yet been migrated to the new v3 cloud system.
migration.migrationDesc: {detected} The account migration tool will attempt to transfer all v2 cloud data to the new v3 backend. This process may take some time; please don't refresh or close the page during the migration process. After using this tool (or dismissing it), you can find it again in the "Cloud Data" tab.
migration.v2NotModified: Your v2 data will {not} be modified or deleted by this process.
migration.noData: No importable data was found in your v2 cloud storage.
migration.pilotsPending: {count} pilot pending (missing LCPs) | {count} pilots pending (missing LCPs)
migration.npcsPending: {count} NPC pending (missing LCPs) | {count} NPCs pending (missing LCPs)
migration.encountersPending: {count} encounter pending (missing NPCs) | {count} encounters pending (missing NPCs)
migration.lcpsImported: {count} content pack imported | {count} content packs imported
migration.errorsDuringMigration: {count} error during migration | {count} errors during migration
migration.dismissNote: This panel can be safely dismissed. If you need to retry the migration you can repeat this process from the "Cloud Data" tab.

archive.patreonOnly: Due to the server costs associated the creation and storage of backup data, this feature is only available to Patreon subscribers. If you would like access to automated cloud backups, please consider {link} to support the development of @:{'common.appName'} and gain access to additional features.
archive.preventPrune: Prevent this item from being automatically pruned. Preserved archives will still count towards size and space limitations.
archive.removeProtection: Remove auto-delete protections on this item
archive.revertWarning1: This will replace your current @:{'common.appName'} data with the data from this archive. This action cannot be automatically undone, so it is strongly recommended that you create a new archive before proceeding.
archive.revertWarning2: This tool only affects your local data. It will not affect any data stored in the cloud.
archive.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this archive? This action cannot be undone.
archive.cloudFullArchive: Cloud storage is full! Unable to create new archives.
archive.settingsDesc1: @:{'common.appName'} can create and save a backup of your data at the selected interval. These archives can be used to roll back your data to a previous state.
archive.settingsDesc2: @:{'common.appName'} will automatically delete old archives to save space. This process runs whenever a new archive is created, or can be manually triggered by clicking the Prune Items button below.

publishing.accessInfo: Due to the server costs associated with the creation and distribution of these collections, this tool is only available to Patreon subscribers. If you would like to access this tool and create and distribute collections of your @:{'common.appName'} content, please consider {link} to support the development of @:{'common.appName'} and gain access to additional features.
publishing.howeverView: However, you can still view and subscribe to collections created by other users.
publishing.itemModified: This item has been modified locally and will be updated to the newest version on publishing.
publishing.itemUpToDate: This item is up to date with the version found in local data.
publishing.itemNotFound: This item cannot be found in local data and is unable to be updated. It will persist in the collection until removed.
publishing.removeItemTooltip: Remove this item from this collection. This does not remove the item from your local or cloud storage @:{'common.appName'} data.
publishing.mustPublish: Collection must be published to generate a share code.
publishing.deleteCollectionWarning: Deleting this collection will remove the collection from your local and cloud data, and will delete the collection archive from cloud storage. Users will not be able to subscribe to this content and current subscribers will no longer be able to update collection data. It {willNot} delete any collection content, either locally or on the cloud for you or collection subscribers.
publishing.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this collection?

dataItem.remoteItemDesc: This item is linked to another user's data. Changes they make will be downloaded on sync.
dataItem.remoteInaccessibleDesc: This cloud data for this item could not be found. This can happen when the owner deletes the item, or if there was an error during sync. You can attempt to restore the remote link or convert this item to a local copy.
dataItem.remoteLinkBroken: Remote link broken — owner's data not found. Retry or convert to local.
dataItem.editableCampaignDesc: This is an editable campaign you have created in the GM Campaign Editor. This data can be synced to the cloud for safekeeping and sharing with other devices, but are not sharable via the Share Code system.
dataItem.convertToLocalDesc: Remove the remote link. Data is kept locally.
dataItem.restoreItemDesc: Restore this item. This item will no longer be marked as deleted and will sync to this and other devices.
dataItem.deletePermanentlyDesc: This will permanently remove the item from local storage. If the item has been synced to the cloud, it will also be marked as deleted there.
dataItem.deleteImmediatelyDesc: Deleting this item will remove it from cloud storage. This will not modify any local copies of this item.
dataItem.deleteLocalDataDesc: This marks this item as deleted locally, and will be removed from this table and will not be synced. Deleted item recovery options can be found in user settings.
dataItem.deleteCloudItemDesc: Deleting this item will mark it as deleted in the cloud. It will not delete this item locally, but will prevent it from syncing to the cloud or to other devices.
dataItem.chooseDeleteMethod: Choose how to delete the selected items

fields.doNotShowThisWarningAgain: Do not show this warning again
fields.deleteCloudAndMarkLocalAsDeleted: Delete cloud and mark local as deleted
fields.deleteCloudDataOnlyKeep: Delete cloud data only (keep local data)

titles.youDoNotHaveAccess: You do not have access to remote backups.
titles.youDoNotHaveAccess2: You do not have access to the collection publishing tool.

tooltips.thisToolWillCaptureA: This tool will capture a snapshot of your local @:{'common.appName'} data and store it in a cloud archive. You can use this to restore your @:{'common.appName'} data to a previous state. This feature is only available to Patreon supporters.
tooltips.thisIsAViewOf: This is a view of your @:{'common.appName'} data, stored both locally and in the cloud. You can use this tool to manage the state of your data, and to sync changes between your local data and the cloud.
tooltips.paidLcpContentRequiresA: Paid LCP content requires a linked itch.io purchase before they can be automatically updated. At this time, only Massif-published LCPs are supported.
tooltips.theseOptionsControlHowAnd: These options control how and when your data is synchronized with the cloud. By default, data is only synced manually. Unlike other user settings, these settings are stored in the cloud and are applied to all devices you use.
tooltips.controlsHowOftenYourData: Controls how often your data is synchronized with the cloud. Due to server costs, certain options are only available to Patreon subscribers.
tooltips.controlsWhichDataTypesAre: Controls which data types are synced with the cloud.
tooltips.yourUniqueAccountIdThis: Your unique account ID. This is used to identify your account in the cloud and may be requested for troubleshooting purposes.
tooltips.usernameOptional: This is an optional field that you can use to set a custom name for your account. This username will be visible to other users in active mode and when sharing data.

subtitles.mergeAndSyncThisItem: Merge and sync this item immediately.
subtitles.pushLocalDataToCloud: Push local data to cloud unconditionally, overwriting remote.
subtitles.mergeLatestCloudDataInto: Merge latest cloud data into this item, preserving any newer local fields.
subtitles.removeTheRemoteLinkAnd: Remove the remote link and keep data locally.
subtitles.pushesAllLocalDataTo: Pushes all local data to the cloud unconditionally, resetting field timestamps to now. Use after a restore or import.
subtitles.pullsAllCloudDataAnd: Pulls all cloud data and merges it with local data. Local fields with newer timestamps are preserved.
subtitles.permanentlyRemovesItemsFlaggedFor: Permanently removes items flagged for deletion.

loadout.synergyWarning: The rules in these synergy hints are {not} automatically enforced by @:{'common.appName'}. Please ensure you manually apply any relevant effects during gameplay.
loadout.lancerSuperheavyClassArmamentRequiresTwo: Lancer, Superheavy-class armament requires two mounts. Please select a {mount}
loadout.thisBracingMountWillBeNot: This bracing mount will be not be able to field armament until the Superheavy weapon is removed.
loadout.theSUPERHEAVYMOUNTINGCoreBonusRequires: The SUPERHEAVY MOUNTING Core Bonus requires bracing on a Heavy Mount, if available.
loadout.unionARMORYEQUIPMENTAUTHORIZATIONFRAMEEQ: Union armory equipment authorization: frame equipment//combat system
loadout.gmsARMORYEQUIPMENTAUTHORIZATIONPILOTPERS: GMS armory equipment authorization: pilot/personal armor::TI - TVII-a
GMS armory equipment authorization: pilot/personal armament::S0 - S3(LTD)

import.v2BackupText: {callsign} saved to pending v2 imports in the Content Manager.

export.exportErrorText: @:{'common.appName'} was unable to export pilot data

level.theUADIDENTMV2License: The UAD IDENT MV-2 License Acquisition Request has been designed to allow active Union personnel to register license updates while field-deployed and receive immediate UN and GMS field support resources. Union personnel should confirm the correctness of their submitted form with their local Union officer, or, in the event an officer is unavailable, request an NHP-directed review at secure Omninet address {node}
level.submittingUnauthorizedLicensingUpdatesAn: Submitting unauthorized licensing updates and/or submitting applications for unauthorized or previously-witheld license rights without prior MV-8a/j authorization by a Union Administrator will result in the automatic rejection of the licensing application and may result in a licensing audit under DoJ/HR AR 716-J
level.theUADIDENTServiceHasDetermined: The UAD IDENT Service has determined that
level.isEligibleForTheFollowingLicense: is eligible for the following license update

new.welcomeToTheUnionAdministrativeDepartmen: Welcome to the Union Administrative Department's IDENT registration service. IDENT is the omninet-based certification system that guides the user through the UAD's pilot registration process. IDENT helps ensure pilots meet regulatory and policy requirements through the use of NHP-directed data validation protocols. Union Regulars that have already been issued an RM-4 IDENT fingerprint should not complete this form unless instructed to by their commanding officer.
new.bySubmittingThisFormYouAttest: By submitting this form you attest that your responses are truthful and accurate to the best of your knowledge. Knowingly providing false or or incomplete information is punishable under DoJ/HR AR 303-J.
new.rm401FULLNAMEOR: RM-4-01 // full name or primary alias
new.rm402APPROVEDCALLSIGNOR: RM-4-02 // approved callsign (or cadet designation, if applicable)
new.rm403PRIOROCCUPATIONOR: RM-4-03 // PRIOR OCCUPATION OR POSITION (ANSWER 17b ON RM-2-C)
new.rm405ATTACHEDOHMHEALTH: RM-4-05 // attached OHM health examination results
new.rm4EXTERNALLICENSEDATATRANSFER: RM-4-δ // EXTERNAL LICENSE DATA TRANSFER (IF APPLICABLE)
new.perThe5017PRMALTAct: Per the 5017 PRM-ALT Act, the Union Administrative Department's IDENT registration service provides a Quick Access Selection module, created and curated by UAD Armored Cavalary Support. The UAD-ACS NHP staff have generated a selection of Combat Doctrine Templates based on the results of your OHM Health Examination//CR-2 Brain Activity Scan. Each of these templates will populate the remainder of your IDENT Combat Registration with a tailored set of combat-role-optimal responses.
new.selectingATemplateWillCompleteThe: Selecting a template will complete the New Pilot interface and start your Pilot with a curated set of skills and talents and an outfitted GMS EVEREST mech, tailored to the combat role selected below. All of these selections may be edited at any time through the Pilot and Mech Sheet loadout sections, as well as section headings with the

sheet.printTabletopReadyCharacterAndMech: Print tabletop-ready character and mech sheets
sheet.getAPlaintextRepresentationOfThis: Get a plaintext representation of this character's build
sheet.exportThisPilotAsAJSON: Export this pilot as a JSON file
sheet.exportThisPilotAsAV2: Export this pilot as a v2 JSON file compatible with VTT systems and v2 apps
sheet.shareThisPilotSDataWith: Share this pilot's data with other users via a share code
sheet.convertThisPilotToAnEditable: Convert this Pilot to an editable local data instance
sheet.duplicateOrFlashCloneThisCharacter: Duplicate or Flash Clone this character
sheet.manageWhichContentPacksAreAccessible: Manage which content packs are accessible to this pilot
sheet.pilotIsUpToDateWith: Pilot is up to date with remote data
sheet.downloadAllRemoteChangesToThis: Download all remote changes to this pilot, overwriting local data.
sheet.removeThisPilotFromTheRoster: Remove this pilot from the roster
sheet.duplicatingOrCloningAPilotWill: Duplicating or Cloning a pilot will remove any Vault links, saving the copied Pilot as a new character on your account
sheet.anyOrganizationsIndividualsOrTechnologie: Any organizations, individuals, or technologies engaging in or facilitating whole-body facsimile cloning are bound by the First Contact Accords of 3002. Any activities that violate the principles set forth in the Accords are prohibited, including but not limited to
sheet.reproductionOfTheSubjectivePersonageOf: Reproduction of the subjective personage of a sentient being or other subjective continuity in whole or in part.
sheet.transferOrTheSubjectivePersonageOf: Transfer or the subjective personage of a sentient being or other subjective continuity into a manufactured or cultivated substrate.
sheet.emulationOfASentientIndividualS: Emulation of a sentient individual's subjective personage in a manufactured or cultivated substrate.
sheet.intentionalDecorporealizationOfASentient: Intentional decorporealization of a sentient being or other subjective continuity.
sheet.engagingInAnyActivityThatCould: Engaging in any activity that could potentially subject a sentient being or other subjective continuity to process deordering, schizo-ontological dissonance, personality dissolution, or other any form of subjective disintegration.
sheet.allFormsOfWholeSubjectivityRapid: All forms of whole-subjectivity rapid process cloning are prohibited under Union jurisdiction. Any persons found to be in violation of this statute will be subject to prosecution by the Union Department of Justice and Human Resource Facsimile Rights Department.
sheet.editingThisPilotSLevelMay: Editing this Pilot's level may prevent certain achievements from being unlocked with this Pilot. If you want to use this Pilot to unlock Pilot-related achievements, use the Level Up wizard instead.
sheet.thisPilotSLevelHasBeen: This pilot's level has been edited. This will prevent certain achievements from being unlocked with this Pilot.
sheet.thisToolSkipsTheLevelUp: This tool skips the level up wizard. Pilot attributes gained through levelling up, such as skill triggers, licenses, talents, mech skills, and CORE bonuses will have to be updated manually
sheet.errNAMENOTFOUNDUNABLETO: Err name not found unable to generate uuid
sheet.setMaximumPilotStressStressGains: Set maximum pilot stress. Stress gains from sources like selected Bond Powers are not automated
sheet.unionAdministrativeIdentRecord: Union Administrative RM-4 Pilot Identification Protocol (IDENT) Record
sheet.identRecordNotice: Improper use of this IDENT record and/or its constituent data by the record holder or any other persons is punishable under the DoJ/HR A-645-c. This record is the property of the Union Administrative Office and the information herein must be transmitted on request under NDL-C-DISCORDANT-BREATH encryption protocols. This RM-4 record must be updated every five (5) Cradle Standard Years of objective time to retain GMS licensing rights. Far-field operatives that anticipate deployments lasting longer than five Cradle Standard Years that have not been issued a man-portable Omninet Hook should apply for the RM-11-B IDENT Supplemental (b) Extension. Contact your local Union Administrative Officer for any other matters regarding this record. V-CDL//M-265-114-831 (A)

roster.allPilotsAssignedToThisGroup: All pilots assigned to this group will be permanently deleted.
roster.allPilotsAssignedToThisGroup2: All pilots assigned to this group will be moved to the "No Group" section
roster.addANewPilotToThe: Add a new pilot to the roster
roster.identCR7aCAVALRYUNITREGISTRATION: IDENT-CR-7a (CAVALRY UNIT REGISTRATION) is a self-directed registration form for the purpose of registering a new unit designation for one or more IDENT-registered pilots. This form is to be used by pilots who are not currently assigned to a unit or who are registering a new unit designation for the first time. If you wish to register a new designation for an existing unit, please submit form CR-7b (CAVALRY UNIT DOCUMENTATION UPDATE) instead.
roster.unitRegistrationSubmissionWillBeReviewed: Unit registration submission will be reviewed by the UAD/CAVCOM Office of Records in the order they are received.
roster.cr702aATTACHEDNDAPCOMP: CR-7-02a // ATTACHED NDAP COMP/DISP ANALYSIS RESULTS
roster.thisAppearsToBePilotData: This appears to be Pilot data from an older @:{'common.appName'} release. @:{'common.appName'} will attempt to convert and import this data, but may not be able to convert all items and may not be able to furnish information about missing LCP requirements.
roster.includesDATAFROMTHEFOLLOWINGCONTENT: Includes data from the following content packs
roster.thisPilotContainsContentFromThe: This Pilot contains content from the following Lancer Content Packs that are not currently installed/active, or have mismatching versions
roster.thisPilotWillBeSavedTo: This Pilot will be saved to the v2 Imports collection in the Content Manager. It can be imported once the missing content packs are installed and activated, or force-imported with missing items stripped.
roster.thisPilotMayBeImportedBut: This Pilot may be imported, but some items from missing content packs will be instanced from saved data. If removed, these items will not be able to be re-equipped without the missing content packs.

selectors.notInCompendium: The following {type} are not present in the compendium

shared.pilotSKILLTRIGGERSMissingOrIncomplete: PILOT SKILL TRIGGERS missing or incomplete
shared.pilotMECHSKILLSMissingOrIncomplete: PILOT MECH SKILLS missing or incomplete
shared.pilotLICENSEDATAMissingOrIncomplete: PILOT LICENSE DATA missing or incomplete
shared.pilotCOREBONUSDATAMissingOr: PILOT CORE BONUS DATA missing or incomplete
shared.pilotSKILLTRIGGERSIncompleteOrInvalid: PILOT SKILL TRIGGERS incomplete or invalid
shared.pilotMECHSKILLSIncompleteOrInvalid: PILOT MECH SKILLS incomplete or invalid
shared.pilotCOREBONUSESIncompleteOrInvalid: PILOT CORE BONUSES incomplete or invalid
shared.theRM4SupplementalIICore: The RM-4β Supplemental II (Core Modification) registers a individual pilot's Core Modification Data (CMD) Archive to be made available for printing and outfitting services.
shared.theMV2ASupplementalAmendment: The MV-2(a) Supplemental Amendment registers a major CORE modification, upgrade, retrofit, or enhancement. The Union Naval Intelligence Board only recognizes CORE augmentation from a Union-approved and registered Lincensor.
shared.theUnionLicensingAuthorityAndThe: The Union Licensing Authority and the Union Administration Department hereby disclaim any and all responsibility for Core Modifications.
shared.theRM4SupplementalILicensing: The RM-4α Supplemental I (Licensing Authorization) registers an individual pilot's Frame Print and Operation (FP/O) Licenses under the Union Licensing Authority.
shared.theMV2LicensorLicenseeTransmit: The MV-2 Licensor/Licensee Transmit Record registers the transmission and receipt of a UN-recognized FRAME License consisting of, but not limited to, Equipment Print Templates not exceeding 1.5EB, FRAME Print Templates not exceeding 3.75EB, and access protocols to FRAME-compliant system software.
shared.unionAndItsRepresentativesAreNot: Union and its representatives are not liable for problems arising from the printing, installation, and/or use of unrecognized or prohibited License materials.
shared.theRM4bPILOTSELFASSESSMENT: The RM-4b PILOT SELF ASSESSMENT (Mech Skills) will be transmitted to print staff to finalize the configuration of your issued GMS-SP1 EVEREST.
shared.bySubmittingThisFormYouAttest: By submitting this form you attest that your responses are truthful and accurate to the best of your knowledge. Knowingly providing false or incomplete information is punishable under DoJ/HR AR 303-J.
shared.theRM4bPILOTSELFASSESSMENT2: The RM-4b PILOT SELF ASSESSMENT (Skills) audit catalogs an individual pilot's self-reported strengths based on selections derived from the results of the OHM Health Examination//CR-2 Brain Activity Scan and uptake responses given to the presiding Union Administrator's NHP representative.
shared.theFollowingFormIsComprisedOf: The following form is comprised of unfiltered output generated by one or more UNI-TACANALYSIS Non-Human Persons and MAY NOT be copied, translated, reproduced, transmitted, or encoded without the express permission of Union Naval Intelligence.
shared.theMV2APilotSelfAssessment: The MV2/a Pilot Self Assessment audit catalogs an individual pilot's self-reported strengths based on selections derived from battlefield telemetry and debrief records analyzed by a Union Naval NHP representative.
shared.identSERVICEPRIMARYHasGeneratedA: IDENT.SERVICE.PRIMARY has generated a list of suggested Skill Triggers based on your answer to RM-4-03 (PRIOR OCCUPATION OR POSITION).
shared.theRM4bPILOTSELFASSESSMENT3: The RM-4b PILOT SELF ASSESSMENT (Talents) audit catalogs an individual pilot's self-reported combat operation aptitudes and confers requisition privileges for simulator time, holofield and cortical sensorium training materials, battlefield telemetry data at classifications below GREY SIERRA SHARP, and (in specific cases) GMS MM-pattern materiel licenses.
shared.theCombatOperationAbilityRequisitionOn: The Combat Operation Ability Requisition, on the approval of a NHP-guided automated request approval system, confers UNI simulator privileges, holofield and cortical sensorium training materials, battlefield telemetry data at classifications below GREY SIERRA SHARP, and (in specific cases) GMS MM-pattern materiel licenses.
shared.warningSubmission: WARNING: Submission for IDENT record {id} has the following issue(s)
shared.addOrImproveSkill: Add or Improve a Skill Trigger.
shared.onAcceptanceFrameConfig: On acceptance of the MV-2//c Frame Configuration Update the Union IDENT//eng subsystem will automatically update the frame configuration protocols stored in the Omninet Vault address registered to your IDENT profile (V.node::/{id}).
shared.selectLicenseRanks: Select {word} ({count}) License Rank. | Select {word} ({count}) License Ranks.

tooltips.thisProjectIsCompleteAndAvailableToUseAs: This project is complete and available to use as a reserve
tooltips.startThisPilotAtA: Start this Pilot at a specific license level. Recommended for advanced users.
tooltips.thisWillCreateACopy: This will create a copy of this pilot data, registered to your pilot roster.
tooltips.thisWillCloneTheSelected: This will clone the selected pilot. Cloned characters can’t join a mission in progress, and cloned characters receive a random quirk. Additional cloning and subjectivity imprinting adds further quirks.
tooltips.addingThisItemAsA: Adding this item as a remote resource will create a readonly version of this item linked to the author's original data. When the author saves an update to this item to their @:{'common.appName'} cloud account, your local version can receive those changes.
tooltips.thisProjectIsComplexResourceintensive: This project is complex, resource-intensive, or generally difficult to complete

actions.createAndModifyMechsAndTheirLoadouts: Create and Modify Mechs and their Loadouts

actions.pilotSkillTriggersReservesAnd: Pilot Skill Triggers, Reserves, and Pilot Gear Loadout

reference.faqErrataNotice: This FAQ and Errata is a community-driven project and is not part of an official Massif Press @:{'common.gameName'} release. This page is furnished by FAQ data from the {repoLink} on GitHub, currently maintained by lenaleciel. This document is also available at {siteLink}.

campaign.developmentPreview: Campaigns are currently in active development and will not be deployed until v3.1. This preview should be ignored for testing, but feel free to explore the existing functionality.
campaign.importHint: Campaigns can be imported via File Import or the Lancer Campaign Directory
campaign.newVersionAvailable: There is a new version of this campaign available. Click the update below to download and install the latest version of this campaign.
campaign.removeConfirm: This will remove the campaign from your collection. Are you sure?
campaign.directoryComingSoon: After v3 release this will be a searchable directory of Massif and community-created campaigns. If you're logged in and have linked an itch.io account, you'll be able to import campaigns directly from the directory. Otherwise you'll be directed to the itch.io page to purchase and download the campaign.
campaign.existingNewer: The existing campaign is newer than the imported data.
campaign.recommendedForLine: Recommended for {players} players at License Level {levels}
campaign.campaignForLine: A {lancer} campaign for {players} pilots starting at License Level {levels}.

card.deprecated: This item is deprecated and can be removed.
card.weaponAttacks: This weapon can make {count} attacks at a time. Multiple attacks may be made against the same or different targets.

combat.bonusDamageHalved: Bonus Damage will be halved (Area of Effect)
combat.critDamageYes: This damage is rolled as critical damage (roll twice, take highest)
combat.critDamageNo: This damage does not roll as critical damage
combat.apNo: This damage does not ignore armor
combat.irreducibleYes: This damage cannot be reduced in any way
combat.irreducibleNo: This damage can be reduced by the target's defenses
combat.overkillYes: This damage is subject to OVERKILL rules (reroll 1s, add heat (self))
combat.overkillNo: This damage is not subject to OVERKILL rules

clock.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this clock? This action cannot be undone.

brokenRef.partOfPack: This item is part of the following Lancer Content Pack
brokenRef.instancedNote: This item has been instanced as a unique object and if removed will not be available until the associated LCP is installed.

remote.collectionHelp: This {type} is linked to a content collection. It is read-only and will receive updates when a new version of the collection is published by the collection's author.
remote.remoteHelp: This {type} is a remote resource linked to another user's account. It is read-only and will receive updates from the linked account.

missing.hoverHelp: This {type} is missing necessary LCP data. @:{'common.appName'} will not be able to load this {type} until the missing content is added.
missing.eidolonHelp: Eidolons require the installation of the Content Pack provided with {pack}
missing.npcHelp: @:{'common.appName'} is unable to load NPC data without the installation of the NPC Content Pack provided with the paid (GM) version of the {pack}
missing.wallflowerPack: No Room for a Wallflower Act 1
missing.usesContent: This item uses content from the {pack} Lancer Content Pack. Equipment from this content pack will be {instanced} until the required LCP is {state} via the Manage Content menu.
missing.requestsNewer: This item requests a version of the {pack} Lancer Content Pack newer than the one that is currently installed.
missing.packActive: The {pack} Lancer Content Pack is installed and active.
missing.otherError: @:{'common.appName'} encountered an error while loading this item.
missing.checkLog: Please check the error log in the "Log" tab of the Options menu for more information
missing.gmHelp1: If you have already downloaded the NPC data, you can import it into @:{'common.appName'} via the Content Manager available on the Main Menu or in the Options menu on the right side of the nav bar.
missing.gmHelp2: If you purchased a physical copy of the Lancer Core Book, but have not received instructions on how to redeem your copy of the digital version and its associated assets, including core NPC data, please contact Massif Press at {email}
missing.npcDataHelp: NPC data are included with the paid version of the Lancer Core Book and are therefore not included with @:{'common.appName'} by default. You can find NPC Class, Template, and Feature data as additional downloadable content on the {link}.

shareImport.userOwned: You are the author of this item. You cannot add your own items as remote resources.
shareImport.alreadyAdded: This item has already been added as a remote resource.
shareImport.qrTypeHelp: This item is a {qr}. It can still be imported, but will appear in the {qr} list, not the {type} list.

rollTable.gmOnlyTooltip: Marking a field or item "GM Only" will hide it from player-facing exports and print output
rollTable.rebuildConfirm: Do you want to rebuild this table? This will clear out the current data. This action cannot be undone.
rollTable.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this table? This action cannot be undone.

relationship.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this relationship? This action cannot be undone.

pwa.updateAvailable: A new version of @:{'common.appName'} is available.

license.prereqCumulative: This License requires at least {rank} cumulative Ranks of {source} licenses
license.prereqSingle: This License requires at least one other {source} License at Rank {rank} or above

coreBonus.instancedWarning: {warning} This is an instanced item. If removed, this Core bonus will not be available until the associated LCP is installed.

image.dragHelp1: Drag stencil to move crop target, drag handles to resize
image.dragHelp2: Drag image to reposition, mouse wheel to zoom image
image.overCapacity: Your account is over capacity. Free accounts are restricted to {max}MB of storage.
image.patreonNote: In an upcoming release you will be able to link your Patreon account, and @:{'common.appName'} supporters will not be subject to any storage limits.
image.remoteGalleryNote: Images in this gallery are links to remote resources and are not managed by @:{'common.appName'}. If you do not control the remote host, items may be removed or changed at any time.

tooltips.markingAFieldOrItem: Marking a field or item 'GM Only' will hide it from player-facing exports and print output
tooltips.markThisResourceAsUsed: Mark this resource as used or unavailable (but not consumed, destroyed or lost)

dataItem.retryFailedText: The remote item for {name} could not be found.

share.syncInProgressText: Please wait for the current sync to complete.

shareCode.collectionCopiedText: Collection share code copied to clipboard

pilot.upToDateText: Pilot {callsign} // {name} already has the most recent cloud data. No update needed.

gm.v2BackupText: {count} item saved to pending v2 imports in the Content Manager. | {count} items saved to pending v2 imports in the Content Manager.
gm.loginRequiredText: You must be logged in to upload campaign data to the cloud repository.

account.verificationSentText: Please check your inbox for the verification code
account.emailChangeCompleteText: Your e-mail address has been changed
account.emailChangeCancelledText: The e-mail change has been cancelled
account.itchLinkedText: Your itch.io account has been linked
account.itchLinkFailedText: There was an error linking your itch.io account
account.itchUnlinkedText: Your itch.io account has been unlinked
account.patreonLinkedText: Your Patreon account has been linked
account.noSubscriptionText: Your Patreon account was linked but no active subscription tier was found. Please subscribe to the @:{'common.appName'} Patreon and try again.
account.patreonLinkFailedText: There was an error linking your Patreon account
account.patreonUnlinkedText: Your Patreon account has been unlinked
account.cloudArchiveCooldownText: You must wait {seconds} seconds before creating a new archive.

settings.dataReplaced: All existing data has been replaced with imported data.
settings.dataMerged: Imported data has been merged with existing data.

lcp.removedInvalidVersionText: Removed {name} from import -- invalid version string breaks semver
lcp.lcpUpdatedText: The latest version of {pack} has been downloaded and installed.
lcp.lcpUpdateErrorText: An error occurred while attempting to download {pack}.

link.copiedText: {name} static link has been copied to the clipboard.

share.shareCodesNote: Share codes allow anyone with a @:{'common.appName'} account to download a copy of this item and receive updates you make. Please be conscientious when sharing data with others.
share.shareCodeTooltip: This code allows other users with a @:{'common.appName'} account to download a copy of this item and subscribe to updates you make.
share.publicLinkNote: This link is a {emphasis} that allows anyone to view this pilot's data.
share.noShareCode: This item does not have a share code. To share it, sync it to your @:{'common.appName'} account by clicking the "Sync Now" button above.
